title: SIMALA 19mm Chair Leg Floor Protectors, 5mm Thick Furniture Pads Floor Protectors For Increased Durability. Ideal Felt Pads For Hard Surfaces, 40 Pieces
features: 19mm Chair Leg Floor Protectors: This pack includes 40 high-density felt pads, precisely measured at 19mm in diameter and 5mm thick, providing comprehensive floor protection.
Tailored Fit for Furniture Legs: Crafted for optimal compatibility, these 19mm round felt pads ensure a snug and protective fit on chair and furniture legs, shielding your floors from scratches.
Self-Adhesive Convenience: Easily apply these furniture pads with their self-adhesive backing, offering a secure and straightforward solution for protecting your floors.
Pack of 40: With a generous quantity of 40 felt pads per pack, you can safeguard a multitude of chairs and furniture pieces, all designed for the 19mm size diameter.
Optimal 19mm Size Diameter: The precisely measured 19mm diameter guarantees these floor protectors are an exact fit for chair and furniture legs, maximizing their effectiveness.
Floor Protectors for Furniture Legs: Combat scratches and dings with these furniture pads, expertly tailored to the 19mm size diameter of chair and furniture legs.
Felt Pads Furniture Feet: Offering a cushioned barrier between furniture feet and floors, these 19mm felt pads extend the life of your furniture and maintain your floor's pristine condition.
Chair Leg Protectors: Safeguard chairs from potential damage caused by daily wear and tear with these 19mm chair leg floor protectors.
Chair Feet Floor Protectors: Tailored to the 19mm size diameter, these felt pads are the ideal solution for protecting chair feet, ensuring both functionality and aesthetic preservation.
Effortless Application: The self-adhesive backing of these felt pads for furniture feet simplifies the application process, making it quick and efficient to maintain the integrity of your floors.
description: Product description Furniture felt pads provide an excellent solution for protecting your floors and furniture from scratches, scuffs, and other types of damage. Made from soft and durable materials, these felt pads attach easily to the bottom of your furniture legs, providing a cushioned layer that helps to prevent scratches and dents from occurring. One of the biggest benefits of using furniture felt pads is their ability to protect all types of flooring surfaces, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and more. Whether you have expensive hardwood floors or delicate tile, these pads provide a reliable layer of protection that helps to keep your floors looking beautiful for years to come. In addition to their protective qualities, furniture felt pads are also incredibly versatile. They come in a variety of sizes and shapes, making it easy to find the perfect fit for your furniture. Plus, they can be used on a wide range of furniture pieces, from chairs and tables to sofas and dressers. Not only do furniture felt pads protect your floors and furniture, but they also provide other benefits as well. For example, they can help to reduce noise and vibrations, making it easier to move furniture around without disturbing others. Plus, they can help to extend the life of your furniture by preventing wear and tear from occurring over time. Overall, furniture felt pads provide an affordable and effective solution for protecting your floors and furniture from damage. With their soft and durable construction, versatile design, and numerous benefits, they are an essential tool for anyone looking to maintain the beauty and longevity of their home or office. Safety Warning Use with caution. Attach felt pads to furniture feet to prevent slippage. Do not use on smooth or wet surfaces. Compatible with hardwood, but avoid use on delicate surfaces such as laminate or park.
